login.title: Login to zenstory
login.subtitle: Continue your creative journey
login.planIntentSubtitle: We’ll take you directly to billing to finish the upgrade.

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Start your creative journey
register.planIntentSubtitle: After email verification, we’ll bring you to billing automatically.
register.usernameRule: Username must be at least 3 characters
register.emailRule: Use an email address that can receive verification codes
register.passwordRule: Password must be at least 6 characters
register.confirmPasswordRule: Please re-enter your password to confirm
register.inviteCodeHint: Enter invite code for extra benefits
register.inviteOptionalHint: If you have an invite code, enter it to link referrals
register.inviteRequiredHint: A valid invite code is required to sign up
register.agreePrefix: By creating an account, you agree to the
register.success: Registration successful! Please check your email to verify your account
register.failed: Registration failed. Please try again later.

verifyEmail.title: Verify Your Email
verifyEmail.subtitle: We've sent a 6-digit verification code to {{email}}
verifyEmail.missingEmailSubtitle: Missing email information. Please go back and register again.

forgotPassword.title: Reset Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Please contact support to reset your password for now
forgotPassword.contactSupportHint: Use your registration email to contact support and we’ll help as soon as possible.

errors.shortUsername: Username must be at least 3 characters
errors.shortPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters
errors.mustAcceptTerms: Please agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy first
errors.oauthErrorHint: An error occurred during login. Please try again or use another login method.
errors.emailNotVerified: Email not verified. Please verify your email first.
errors.incompleteCode: Please enter the complete 6-digit verification code
errors.missingVerificationEmail: No verification email found. Please return to sign up and request a new code.
errors.resendFailed: Failed to resend verification code. Please try again
errors.resendCooldown: Please wait {{seconds}} seconds before resending the verification code
